title: omalotheca stewartii
intro: Omalotheca stewartii, also known as woolly cinquefoil, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Omalotheca stewartii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Omalotheca stewartii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
